overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern interior atrium featuring zen garden rock formations and a glass skylight, transitioning into a darker corridor. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-fidelity architectural visualization with dramatic natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern atrium with zen rock garden and glass skylight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit atrium, approaching the far end while passing zen rock formations

entered.detail: large grid-patterned glass ceiling allowing bright sunlight to illuminate the atrium
large sculptural rock sitting in raked gravel bed on the left side of the walkway
large sculptural rock sitting in raked gravel bed on the right side of the walkway
light-colored wooden plank flooring extending through the atrium
second floor balcony with glass railing overlooking the atrium
second floor balcony with glass railing overlooking the atrium
dark entrance doorway at the far end of the atrium between wooden columns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a spacious modern atrium illuminated by bright sunlight streaming through a large glass skylight. Zen rock formations flank the wooden walkway on both sides, while glass-railed upper balconies overlook the space from the second floor. The environment is serene and empty, with dramatic grid-patterned shadows cast across the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: camera begins turning left away from the main atrium toward the corridor entrance
entering the narrow dark corridor from the bright open atrium
natural sunlight fades completely as the camera moves deeper into the artificially lit corridor

agents.ego_description: turning left and proceeding down the dimly lit corridor, passing a wall-mounted fire extinguisher

entered.detail: narrow dark passage leading away from the atrium with minimal lighting
red fire safety equipment mounted on the dark wall
green illuminated exit sign visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and transitions from the bright atrium into a narrow, dimly lit corridor. Natural light fades as the space becomes enclosed, with only artificial lighting illuminating the wooden floor and dark walls. A red fire extinguisher is mounted on the left wall as the camera proceeds deeper into the shadowed passageway toward a distant green exit sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, airy atrium into a narrow, shadowed corridor. It begins by gliding forward through a spacious modern hall where sunlight streams through a glass skylight, casting dramatic grid-patterned shadows across a wooden walkway flanked by zen rock formations and glass balconies. As the camera turns left, the open serenity of the atrium fades and the environment becomes enclosed, shifting the lighting from brilliant natural glare to dim artificial tones. The scene then narrows into a dark passageway with wooden floors and dark walls, passing a red fire extinguisher on the left before proceeding deeper toward a distant green exit sign.
